sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride officially opened with Toy Story Playland on 17 August 2010.

fullText:
RC Racer is an Intamin launched shuttle roller coaster located at Walt Disney Studios Park in Marne la Vallée, Île-de-France, France.

The ride officially opened with Toy Story Playland on 17 August 2010.

The track is themed to a toy ramp.

Orange track and purple supports.

The train is themed to resemble RC, a character from the Toy Story movie franchise.
